name: souroldgeezer-architecture

Covers dediren package source, SVG render evidence, optional OEF/XMI export, cross-notation handoff links, build/extract/review/render/validate/lookup, drift detection, .NET™ / Bicep™ / workflow lifting, per-view readiness, matching Claude Code subagent, and Codex skill metadata.
